samples.xml_description:
<module id="right_shifter">
    <description>Implement a right shifter.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="d">Input signal to be right-shifted.</input>
        <output id="q" width_description="[7:0]">Output signal representing the result of the right shift operation.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="width" value="8">Width of the input and output signals.</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="q" type="state" width_description="[7:0]">Register to store the right-shifted result.</reg>
            <always>
                <clk_edge>Positive</clk_edge>
                <statement>
                    <assignment>
                        <left><id>q</id></left>
                        <right><expr>((<id>q</id> >> 1))</expr>
                    </assignment>
                </statement>
            </always>
            <always>
                <clk_edge>Positive</clk_edge>
                <statement>
                    <assignment>
                        <left><id>q[7]</id></left>
                        <right><id>d</id></right>
                    </assignment>
                </statement>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
</module>
